title: Innodata (INOD) Soars After Blowout Q1 AI Earnings Beat
text: Innodata's stock surged 83.58% following exceptional Q1 2026 results. The company reported revenue of $90.1 million, representing 54% year-over-year growth and crushing the $76.5 million consensus estimate by approximately $13.6 million. Financial highlights include adjusted EBITDA nearly doubling to $25 million, with net income more than doubling. Management raised full-year 2026 revenue growth guidance to approximately 40% or higher. The company announced new Big Tech engagements expected to generate roughly $51 million in 2026 revenue. INOD is trading like a momentum monster after its Q1 2026 earnings print, with shares more than doubling from $39.00 in mid-April to $83.66 in early May. The company launched an Evaluation and Observability Platform for agentic AI systems, positioning itself deeper in AI infrastructure. Balance sheet metrics appear solid, featuring minimal debt (0.04 debt-to-equity ratio) and substantial cash reserves of $117.4 million. This represents genuine earnings growth rather than speculative hype.
